# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Profile Pictures and Documents Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class UPDU_User_Files_Upload {
    private $option_key = 'updu_allowed_mime_types';
    private $meta_key = 'updu_user_files';

    public function __construct() {
        add_shortcode('user_files_upload_form', array($this, 'render_upload_form'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'admin_menu'));
    }

    public function admin_menu() {
        add_options_page(
            'User Files Upload Settings',
            'User Files Upload',
            'manage_options',
            'updu-user-files-upload',
            array($this, 'settings_page')
        );
    }

    public function settings_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return;
        }

        $default_mimes = $this->get_default_mimes();

        if (isset($_POST['updu_save_settings'])) {
            check_admin_referer('updu_save_settings_nonce');

            $selected = isset($_POST['updu_mimes']) && is_array($_POST['updu_mimes']) ? array_map('sanitize_text_field', wp_unslash($_POST['updu_mimes'])) : array();
            $valid = array();

            foreach ($selected as $mime) {
                if (isset($default_mimes[$mime])) {
                    $valid[$mime] = $default_mimes[$mime];
                }
            }

            update_option($this->option_key, $valid);
            echo '<div class="updated"><p>Settings saved.</p></div>';
        }

        $saved = $this->get_allowed_mimes();

        echo '<div class="wrap">';
        echo '<h1>User Files Upload Settings</h1>';
        echo '<form method="post">';
        wp_nonce_field('updu_save_settings_nonce');
        echo '<p>Select allowed file types for user uploads:</p>';

        foreach ($default_mimes as $mime => $label) {
            $checked = isset($saved[$mime]) ? 'checked="checked"' : '';
            echo '<label style="display:block;margin:6px 0;">';
            echo '<input type="checkbox" name="updu_mimes[]" value="' . esc_attr($mime) . '" ' . $checked . '> ';
            echo esc_html($label . ' (' . $mime . ')');
            echo '</label>';
        }

        submit_button('Save Settings', 'primary', 'updu_save_settings');
        echo '</form>';
        echo '</div>';
    }

    public function get_default_mimes() {
        return array(
            'image/jpeg' => 'JPEG Image',
            'image/png'  => 'PNG Image',
            'image/gif'  => 'GIF Image',
            'image/webp' => 'WEBP Image',
            'application/pdf' => 'PDF Document',
            'application/msword' => 'DOC Document',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' => 'DOCX Document',
            'application/vnd.ms-excel' => 'XLS Spreadsheet',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet' => 'XLSX Spreadsheet',
            'text/plain' => 'Text File',
            'application/rtf' => 'RTF Document',
            'application/zip' => 'ZIP Archive'
        );
    }

    public function get_allowed_mimes() {
        $saved = get_option($this->option_key, false);
        if ($saved === false || !is_array($saved) || empty($saved)) {
            return $this->get_default_mimes();
        }
        return $saved;
    }

    public function render_upload_form() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $message = '';
        if (isset($_GET['updu_status'])) {
            $status = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['updu_status']));
            if ($status === 'success') {
                $message = '<p style="color:green;">File uploaded successfully.</p>';
            } elseif ($status === 'error') {
                $message = '<p style="color:red;">There was an error uploading the file.</p>';
            } elseif ($status === 'invalid_type') {
                $message = '<p style="color:red;">Invalid file type.</p>';
            } elseif ($status === 'empty') {
                $message = '<p style="color:red;">Please choose a file to upload.</p>';
            }
        }

        $output  = $message;
        $output .= '<form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">';
        $output .= wp_nonce_field('updu_upload_file_action', 'updu_upload_nonce', true, false);
        $output .= '<p><input type="file" name="updu_user_file" required></p>';
        $output .= '<p><label for="updu_file_label">File Label (optional)</label><br><input type="text" name="updu_file_label" id="updu_file_label" value=""></p>';
        $output .= '<p><input type="hidden" name="updu_upload_submit" value="1"><button type="submit">Upload File</button></p>';
        $output .= '</form>';

        $files = get_user_meta(get_current_user_id(), $this->meta_key, true);
        if (is_array($files) && !empty($files)) {
            $output .= '<h3>Your Uploaded Files</h3><ul>';
            foreach ($files as $file) {
                $url = isset($file['url']) ? $file['url'] : '';
                $label = isset($file['label']) && $file['label'] !== '' ? $file['label'] : (isset($file['original_name']) ? $file['original_name'] : 'File');
                $output .= '<li><a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' . esc_html($label) . '</a></li>';
            }
            $output .= '</ul>';
        }

        return $output;
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!isset($_POST['updu_upload_submit'])) {
            return;
        }

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['updu_upload_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['updu_upload_nonce'])), 'updu_upload_file_action')) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_FILES['updu_user_file']) || empty($_FILES['updu_user_file']['name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_status('empty');
        }

        $file = $_FILES['updu_user_file'];

        if (!isset($file['error']) || $file['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->redirect_with_status('error');
        }

        $allowed_mimes = $this->get_allowed_mimes();
        $check = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($file['tmp_name'], $file['name']);
        $mime_type = isset($check['type']) ? $check['type'] : '';

        if (empty($mime_type) || !isset($allowed_mimes[$mime_type])) {
            $this->redirect_with_status('invalid_type');
        }

        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $target_dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . 'user-files/';
        $target_url = trailingslashit($upload_dir['baseurl']) . 'user-files/';

        if (!file_exists($target_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($target_dir);
        }

        $original_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $filename_info = pathinfo($original_name);
        $name = isset($filename_info['filename']) ? $filename_info['filename'] : 'file';
        $ext = isset($filename_info['extension']) ? '.' . $filename_info['extension'] : '';
        $unique_name = $name . '-' . get_current_user_id() . '-' . time() . $ext;

        $destination = $target_dir . $unique_name;

        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            $this->redirect_with_status('error');
        }

        @chmod($destination, 0644);

        $label = isset($_POST['updu_file_label']) ? sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['updu_file_label'])) : '';
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = get_user_meta($user_id, $this->meta_key, true);
        if (!is_array($files)) {
            $files = array();
        }

        $files[] = array(
            'label' => $label,
            'original_name' => $original_name,
            'file_name' => $unique_name,
            'file_path' => $destination,
            'url' => $target_url . $unique_name,
            'mime_type' => $mime_type,
            'uploaded_at' => current_time('mysql')
        );

        update_user_meta($user_id, $this->meta_key, $files);

        $this->redirect_with_status('success');
    }

    private function redirect_with_status($status) {
        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }
        $redirect = add_query_arg('updu_status', $status, $redirect);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }
}

new UPDU_User_Files_Upload();
